description: Agent logs itemized fees but omits total_price. _total_from_params must sum the line items (1500+180+95=1775) rather than fall back to base_price alone — dropping to 1500 here would under-report by 275 and wrongly rank this company best.

simulated_conversation.message: Two bedroom, Rock Hill to Charlotte, no stairs. What's the cost?
Fifteen hundred for the crew and truck. Fuel's one eighty. Packing materials ninety five if you need them — you said self pack so that's optional.
Got it — fifteen hundred base, one eighty fuel, ninety five materials optional. Binding?

tool_calls.params_as_json: {"outcome": "quote_given", "company_name": "Queen City Relocation", "base_price": 1500, "line_items": [{"label": "Crew and truck", "amount": 1500, "is_optional_or_conditional": false}, {"label": "Fuel", "amount": 180, "is_optional_or_conditional": false}, {"label": "Packing materials", "amount": 95, "is_optional_or_conditional": true}], "binding": true}
